jcr:content.jcr:description: Through AbbVie's research and development, we're making the possibilities of medicine a reality. Check out our R&D site to see where we deliver life-improving medicines to address patients' most serious health issues.
jcr:content.jcr:title: R&D Sites
jcr:content.ctaAltText: Learn more about AbbVie's R&D sites

title.title: Pioneering Innovation at AbbVie’s R&D Sites

text_1781939153258.text:
Science and innovation are our lifeblood. Our R&D sites are where we redefine expectations and create the capabilities of tomorrow. These state-of-the-art facilities serve as hubs for discovering and developing life-changing medicines and first-in-kind solutions that can raise the standard of care for people around the world.

Across 17 countries, over 14,000+ scientists and staff are working to discover new therapies for a healthier tomorrow.

block.description: See some of our global research and development sites where 14,000+ scientists and staff are working to discover and develop medicines and solutions.
block.name: Teaser
block.title: AbbVie R&D across the globe

text.text: We have a broad global R&D footprint

Site location spotlight

South San Francisco, CA

This new 48,000-square-foot campus, located in the birthplace of biotech, opens doors to new partnerships and collaboration to advance the next breakthroughs.

From California to Massachusetts to Germany to Japan, we’re creating the capabilities of tomorrow by going beyond “good enough” to deliver potentially life-changing medicines and solutions that server the needs of our patients.

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.text:
AbbVie is headquartered in North Chicago, IL. Here, we take on some of the world's most complex diseases, focusing on immunology, oncology and neuroscience. Our headquarters covers the full spectrum of research and development from the initial idea to the finished product.

Our headquarters is also home to our drug discovery engine, which drives our existing and novel therapeutic platforms, and our Genomics Research Center, which translates genetic information into a more personalized approach to medicines. It’s also home to other areas of expertise, including regulatory affairs, patient safety, manufacturing, process chemistry, solid state chemistry, process engineering, medical affairs, and quality assurance.

Take a virtual tour

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.text: Our Irvine site is home to our Center of Excellence for aesthetics, neurotoxins, neuro-psychiatry, migraine and eye care research. The 54-acre, 1,000,000-square-foot campus offers unique scientific expertise in the research and development of translational and pharmaceutical sciences to deliver patient-centric, innovative medicines.

item_3.name: Accordion Item
item_3.text:
AbbVie's Cambridge Crossing site is a 120,000-square-foot facility located in the Cambridge, Massachusetts biotech corridor. This site is dedicated to all aspects of drug discovery and development for diseases in neuropsychiatry and neurology. Our scientists are focused on understanding the biological mechanisms underlying neuroscience diseases and translating this knowledge to therapies that have the potential to help a broad population of patients with significant unmet needs. This site houses a broad array of teams involved in the discovery, development, and commercialization of the next breakthroughs for patients.

Take a virtual tour

item_4.name: Accordion Item
item_4.text: AbbVie Waltham Area (AWA) site consists of a community of colleagues that work to advance science and make a remarkable impact on patient care. The team’s primary focus is industry-leading oncology R&D, particularly leadership in antibody-drug conjugate therapy development, which supports AbbVie’s ambition to elevate the standard of care for patients.

item_5.name: Accordion Item
item_5.text:
For over 30 years, the AbbVie Bioresearch Center in Worcester, Massachusetts, has been an industry leader in drug discovery, development sciences and biologics research. This 553,000-square-foot facility focuses on biotherapeutics development and explores innovative solutions for some of the toughest challenges in medicine, including immunology and neuroscience.

Take a virtual tour

item_6.name: Accordion Item
item_6.text:
At our integrated facility in Ludwigshafen, Germany, we carry out every step of drug research, development and production. Here, scientists look for ways to treat neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's disease and Parkinson's disease and pioneer new methods of formulating complex compounds to make better medicines possible.

Ludwigshafen also contributes to the digitalization of research by utilizing artificial intelligence, machine learning, bioinformatics and other technologies that enable preclinical and clinical studies worldwide.

Take a virtual tour

item_7.name: Accordion Item
item_7.text: AbbVie's Tokyo R&D site is home to our full clinical development capabilities. To obtain NDA approvals for AbbVie's products for Japanese patients, we conduct studies in parallel from phase 1 to phase 4. We perform strategic clinical planning functions for each focus area to develop the Japan-specific development strategy across oncology, immunology, neuroscience, specialty, eye care and aesthetics.

block_2.caption: AbbVie Corporations HQ, North Chicago, Il
block_2.name: Custom Image

title.title: Want to be a part of the future of medicine?

text.text: Explore R&D career opportunities on the front lines.
